title: elaphoglossum rufum
intro: Elaphoglossum rufum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of terrestrial or epiphytic vascular plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum rufum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
